title: DotGlobeHero Component
content:
The `DotGlobeHero` component is a React component designed to display an animated 3D globe as a hero section. It uses `@react-three/fiber` and `@react-three/drei` to render the globe within a canvas. ## Key Exports - `DotGlobeHero`: The main React component for the globe hero. - `DotGlobeHeroProps`: The TypeScript interface defining the props for `DotGlobeHero`. ## Props - `rotationSpeed` (optional, number): Controls the speed of the globe's rotation. Defaults to `0.005`. - `globeRadius` (optional, number): Determines the radius of the globe. Defaults to `1`. - `className` (optional, string): Allows for custom styling of the container div. - `children` (optional, React.ReactNode): Content to be displayed in the foreground, overlaid on the globe. ## Usage Example ```jsx import { DotGlobeHero } from '@/components/ui/globe-hero'; function MyPage() { return (

); } export default MyPage; ``` ## Internal Components - `Globe`: An internal React component responsible for rendering the 3D globe mesh and handling its rotation animation.
